name: JSON Crack

en.when_to_use: Use it when nested JSON/YAML/CSV needs to become a zoomable, collapsible, searchable node-link diagram instead of a hand-written version, which fails at automatic layout, large-tree interaction, and format conversion. Do not use it as an ordinary JSON text viewer.
en.why_valuable: AI can manually arrange only a few nodes for small JSON. It cannot handle automatic layout for large structures, pan/zoom, collapse/search, format conversion, and reliable image export.

data_in.note: The selected picks upstream is a GitHub-only full application with no pinned npm package/version. A future fork must narrow input to document + format and generate nodes/edges internally through its parser; it must not require the consuming AI to pre-layout coordinates.

schema.document: string | Record<string,unknown> | unknown[] -- for format=json, an object/array may be passed directly; other formats require the raw string
schema.max_renderable_nodes?: integer -- defaults to 1500; beyond it, show a fallback notice instead of continuing layout

when_to_use: 需要把嵌套 JSON/YAML/CSV 变成可缩放、折叠和搜索的节点连线图时用它而非手写,因为原生在自动布局、大树交互和格式转换上失败;非做普通 JSON 文本查看器。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能为小 JSON 手排少量节点,做不到大结构的自动布局、平移缩放、折叠搜索、格式互转和稳定图片导出。

data_in.note: 所选 picks 上游是 github-only 整站且无钉死 npm/version；未来 fork 必须把输入收敛为 document + format,再由内部 parser 生成 nodes/edges,不能要求消费 AI 预布局坐标。

schema.document: string | Record<string,unknown> | unknown[] —— format=json 时可直接传对象/数组；其他格式必须传原始字符串
schema.max_renderable_nodes?: integer —— 默认 1500；超过时显示降级提示而非继续排版

fork_note: picks 指向完整 jsoncrack.com monorepo,未提供可钉死的 npm 名或版本,不能从 GitHub main 直接当稳定 CDN 组件消费。需 fork/选定可发布子包,固定 React peers 与 CSS,暴露 mount(el,data,{height}) 并移除站点路由、编辑器/导出外围后再上架；当前不作可消费条目。
